overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, holographic billboards, and elevated pedestrian walkways. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), with the camera moving steadily through urban intersections and sidewalks while pedestrians with umbrellas and futuristic vehicles populate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk with street railings and digital billboards

events.description: passing a pedestrian holding a glowing umbrella walking in the same direction
futuristic vehicle drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange-textured sidewalk next to a metal railing, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: person with illuminated umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: distinctive orange-brown textured pavement covering the pedestrian walkway
black metal railings separating sidewalk from the street below
large red digital advertisement screen mounted on building facade
enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting buildings with illuminated windows
tall street lamp with cylindrical light fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk sidewalk with distinctive orange pavement and metal railings. The camera moves forward past a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella, while large digital billboards illuminate the scene with red and white light. A futuristic vehicle passes on the street to the left as the camera approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with elevated neon-lit pedestrian bridge

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto the yellow-striped crosswalk entering the intersection
passes underneath the elevated pedestrian walkway with neon pink arch supports

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while walking toward the elevated walkway structure, observing the neon-lit architecture

notable_agents.action: dark-colored futuristic car driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
multi-level pedestrian walkway with glowing pink neon arch supports underneath
rain-slicked dark asphalt reflecting the neon lights and vehicle headlights

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the sidewalk onto a wide intersection marked with yellow crosswalk stripes. Passing underneath an impressive elevated pedestrian bridge illuminated with pink neon arches, the scene opens up to reveal the full scale of the cyberpunk city architecture. Wet asphalt reflects the myriad lights while a futuristic vehicle drives through the intersection in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass beneath concrete overpass with debris piles

events.description: enters the darker area beneath the concrete overpass with reduced lighting
waits as multiple vehicles pass through the intersection before continuing

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection under the overpass, waiting for vehicles to pass before continuing across

notable_agents.action: person with glowing purple umbrella crossing the street in the rain

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge overhead creating a dark sheltered area beneath
large pile of garbage bags and discarded items accumulated under the overpass
utilitarian building exterior with exposed pipes and air conditioning units

segments.scene_description: Moving into a darker, industrial zone beneath a massive concrete overpass, the lighting shifts to artificial sources. The camera navigates around a pile of trash and debris accumulated in the sheltered area, then waits at the intersection as several futuristic vehicles pass by. A pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella crosses the wet street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with transit stop and large vertical billboards

events.description: emerges from under the overpass onto a wider concrete sidewalk with different architecture
passes a transit shelter with illuminated advertisement displays

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk past a bus stop shelter, observing the large digital advertisements on the surrounding buildings

entered.detail: light gray concrete pavement with square tile pattern, different from the orange sidewalk earlier
covered waiting area with glass panels and illuminated advertisement kiosk
tall building-mounted screen displaying purple and yellow neon advertisements
tall palm tree trunk with textured bark in a square planter

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the industrial underpass onto a cleaner commercial sidewalk with light gray concrete tiles. A transit shelter with glowing advertisements appears on the right, while large vertical digital billboards illuminate the buildings ahead. The architecture shifts to a more maintained commercial district with a palm tree visible on the sidewalk as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, transitioning from vibrant neon streets through a gritty industrial underpass and into a polished commercial district. It begins on an orange-paved sidewalk illuminated by red and white digital billboards, moving past a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella as a futuristic vehicle glides by. As the camera reaches a wide intersection, the scene opens up beneath pink neon arches of an elevated pedestrian bridge, where the wet asphalt reflects the towering city architecture. The movement then shifts into a darker, sheltered zone beneath a massive concrete overpass, navigating around piles of debris and waiting for traffic to pass while a purple glowing umbrella crosses the street. Finally, the camera emerges from the industrial shadows onto a clean commercial sidewalk of gray concrete tiles, passing a glowing transit shelter and a palm tree beneath the light of vertical digital billboards.
